laws.title: Public Law 34-242 | Federal Courthouse Security & Jurisdiction Act
laws.status_basis: General and permanent law, but the live branch does not yet contain the note at the classified anchor.

current_implementation.detail: No matching PL-034-242 note was found in usc/usc28.xml.

laws.title: Public Law 34-243 | Judicial Integrity & Accountability Act
laws.status_basis: Direct chapter-level rewrite to Title 28 chapter 16; the branch already carries the enacted replacement text.

current_implementation.detail: Current XML includes the replacement chapter 16 framework and repeal markers for sections 359 and 361.

laws.recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 34-244 | Sentencing Reform Act
laws.status_basis: Direct amendment to 18 U.S.C. 3585, and the current branch already contains the revised text.

current_implementation.detail: Current XML includes the amended commencement and prior-custody-credit language.

laws.recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 34-245 | Legal Compensation Act
laws.status_basis: Direct amendment to 18 U.S.C. 3006A(d) plus repeal of 42 U.S.C. chapter 34 subchapter X with note-style grant authority.

current_implementation.detail: Current XML contains the subsection (d) rewrite and the subchapter repeal with the accompanying legal-representation support note.

laws.recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 34-246 | Sentencing Commission Reform Act
laws.status_basis: Direct Title 28 amendments and repeal markings, all already reflected in the branch.

current_implementation.detail: Current XML shows the revised 991(a), the repeal of 992 and 995, and the expanded 994 duties.

laws.recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 34-247 | Grand Jury Bypass Act
laws.status_basis: General and permanent enactment anchored as a statutory note, and the live branch already carries it.

current_implementation.detail: Current XML contains the Pub. L. 34-247 statutory note at the Title 28 anchor.

laws.recommended_action: No further Code change is required.

laws.title: Public Law 34-248 | Intelligence Community Inspector General Consolidation Act of 2025
laws.status_basis: Classified as non-Code material, so no XML insertion is expected.

current_implementation.detail: No Code location applies for this enactment.

laws.recommended_action: Leave it out of the Code and retain it only as history.

laws.status_basis: Superseded before codification, so it should remain historical only.
